overview.description: The FT Vest U.S. Equity Equal Weight Buffer ETF - September (RSSE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund seeks to match the price return of RSP ETF up to a predetermined upside cap while providing a buffer against the first 10% losses over a one-year period. RSSE was launched on Sep 20, 2024 and is issued by First Trust.
